notes: First post-FFI-wired snapshot: `benches/river.rs` now drives real `NlheSubgame` + `CfrPlus::run_from` on top of A17/A58/A59. Canonical + wet-board benches run at 100 CFR+ iterations (down from the 1000-iter spec) because the pre-SIMD inner loop is ~5-7 ms/iter, making 1000 iters × 100 criterion samples unreasonable at the Day-1-scalar baseline. Degenerate stays at 1000 iters (sub-microsecond per iter, trivial subgame). Baseline captured against workspace HEAD d8505fa after staging A62's dev-dep + bench rewrite; auto-commit hook committed the staged-but-still-dirty file tree under concurrent agent activity during the session, so HEAD may advance by the time A62's commits land. Clean run, no concurrent cargo processes.

river_canonical_spot.notes: AhKhQh2d4s, hero AA/KK/AKs, villain 22+/AJs+/KQs, pot 100, stack 500. ~4.78 ms/CFR+ iter pre-SIMD.

river_degenerate_spot.notes: 2c7d9hTsJs, hero AhKh vs villain AsAd, pot 1000, stack 0. Tree collapses to Check/Check → showdown. 137x under 50 ms target.

river_wet_board.notes: JhTh9c8h7s, hero AA/AKs/QTs, villain 22+/AQs+, pot 100, stack 500. ~6.67 ms/CFR+ iter pre-SIMD; wet four-to-a-flush + straight texture.
